rules.message: Form must have a non-empty formId.
rules.fixHint: Set the formId in form metadata (e.g., 21-526EZ).

rules.message: Form must have a non-empty title.
rules.fixHint: Set a human-readable title in form metadata.

rules.message: Form should declare a rootUrl for VA.gov routing.
rules.fixHint: Add a rootUrl path in metadata (e.g., /education/career-counseling/apply-form-27-8832).

rules.message: Form should declare a submitUrl for the vets-api submission endpoint.
Form should include a plain-language header summarizing what the form does.
rules.fixHint: Add plainLanguageHeader to form metadata; keep it under 80 characters and use action-first wording.

rules.message: Form should declare a trackingPrefix for analytics consistency.
Forms typically need at least 2 chapters (one for content + one for review/certification).
rules.fixHint: Group related questions into chapters; add a certification or review chapter if missing.

rules.message: Pages must have at least one component.
rules.fixHint: Add at least one input or content component to every page.

rules.message: Page titles should be 2 to 120 characters.
rules.fixHint: Use action-oriented page titles (e.g., 'Tell us about your service').

rules.message: Every component must have a label.
rules.fixHint: Set a clear question label for every input component.

rules.message: Component labels should be 2 to 200 characters.
rules.fixHint: Keep labels concise; move long context into hint or bodyText.

rules.message: Component IDs should be lowerCamelCase identifiers.
rules.fixHint: Use stable lowerCamelCase IDs (e.g., 'veteranLastName'). IDs should not be reused after deletion.

rules.message: Inputs with a regex pattern should include a hint explaining the expected format.
rules.fixHint: Add a hint describing the expected format whenever a pattern is set.

rules.message: File upload components must declare an endpoint.
rules.fixHint: Set endpoint to the vets-api attachments URL for this form.

rules.message: File upload components should declare allowed file types.
File upload components should declare a maxFileSize.
rules.fixHint: Set maxFileSize in bytes (e.g., 10485760 for 10 MB).

rules.message: List-loop chapters must declare nounSingular and nounPlural in options.
Form should declare componentSystems for explicit primary/generated/preview targets.
rules.fixHint: Add componentSystems with primary='uswds' and generated='vaFormsSystem'.

rules.message: Form should record provenance source (pdf, manual, normalizedForm, scraped).
rules.fixHint: Migrator stamps a default source. Imported forms get source.kind='pdf'.
